title: Snapshot Delta
description: Shape of snapshots/<v>/delta.json — the per-snapshot classification of every source record vs. the prior snapshot, joined on source_id and compared on row_hash. Drives delta-scoped re-runs. See 01-operating-model.md §5.

previous_snapshot.description: Prior snapshot compared against (e.g. v1). Null for the first snapshot (everything is NEW).

tables.description: One delta block per source table.

new.description: source_ids present only in this snapshot — full pipeline, mint new external_id.

changed.description: source_ids in both but row_hash differs — re-cleanse/assemble only these; external_id reused (load = update).

unchanged.description: source_ids in both with equal row_hash — zero work; reuse cached canonical + external_id.

removed.description: source_ids only in the prior snapshot — never auto-deleted; surfaced for operator judgment.

counts.description: Convenience tallies (must equal the array lengths).

new_value_set_values.description: Coded values seen for the first time in this snapshot, needing a value-set decision (Gate-1 question).

first_seen_in.description: Sample source_ids exhibiting the new value.

new_columns.description: Columns present in this snapshot but absent from the prior one — need mapping (Gate-1 question).
